extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won the sprint finish after early breakaway caught with 4.5km remaining on the only sprinter stage left in the race.
tactical_patterns: Dimension Data and Mitchelton-Scott paced the singular climb to drop sprinters' leadout trains before finale, tactical innovation.
Deceuninck-Quickstep positioned for Jakobsen but AG2R work for Bennett dropped their own sprinter, leadout execution failure.
Van der Sande launched sprint early on uphill finish gaining gap, forcing chasers to drag Bennett into winning position.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: won on uphill finish despite AG2R dropping Jakobsen, shows versatility beyond pure flat sprints
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: dropped by own leadout team's pace on slight uphill finish gradient, confirms flat-only speed profile
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: commentary notes 'unstoppable in mountains' pattern after back-to-back performances, momentum signal
